titleStmt.title: SII 10.159: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 159. (A.R. No. 293 of 1915.) ON A NĀGA PILLAR SET UP IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF RĀMASVĀMI ON THE HILL AT IKKURRU, NARASARAOPETA TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. 10[8]8.

summary.p: States that Mallināyaka of Śiripura made a gift of land and cows to the temple of Mallikārjuna established by him on the top of a hill at Ikkūru for the merit of the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kulōttuṅga-Rājēndra-Chōḍarāja and also refers to other gifts made by others to the same temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti srī śakavarṣa
ṁbulu 1088 nēṁṭi
yāśvayujaśu
ddha 10 guruvāramu
na śrīmanmahāmaṁḍa
lēsvara kulōttuṁggarā
jēṁdracōḍerājulaku
dharmmuvugā śiripurapu
dāmināyaku koḍku
mallināyakuṁḍu Ikkū
raṁ goṁḍamiṁda dama pra

tiṣṭasēsi guḍi ya
ttiṁccina śrīmallikhā
rjunadēvaraku naivē
dyemunakuṁ beṭṭina
kha 3 nīrimarttalu 2
Akhaṁḍyadīpamuna
kuṁ beṭṭina kha 1 mo
davulu 2 vīniṁ jē
koni bollebhaṭlu yā
caṁdrārkyamu nitai
māneṁḍu neyi
vōyunadi © sthānā
patiki kha 1 na 10 śa
ṁkhadēvaniki kha 1 ma
ddaliyadāniki kha 2
Akhaṁḍyadīpamunakuṁ beṭṭina go
ṟiyilu 55 vīniṁ jēkoni pā
manabōyuṁḍu yācaṁ
drārkkamu nitye māneṁḍu ne
yi vōyaṁgalavāṁḍu

ḍuku kommanabōyu
ṁḍu diviya 1 nāṁbebōyu
ṁḍu diviya māśebōyuṁḍu
diviya kōṭibōyuṁḍu diviya
kōṭima diviya śrīmanma
hāmaṁḍalēśvara kōṭado
rājulakuṁ
gāriki dharmmārttamu
gā śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśva
ra mallayadēvamahārājulu
pali pāṭina śrīmallikārjunadē
varakuṁ beṭṭina velivolamu kha 2

rājarāja śrī
mādaluṁgā śrīma
llikhārjunadēvara bra
hmapuruluṁgāṁ be
ṭṭina polamu durggana
bhaṭlaku kha 2 vīri koḍku
dēvanabhaṭlaku kha 2 pe
ddadēvanabhaṭlaku kha 2 gu
ṁḍebhaṭlaku kha 2 nāgana
bhaṭlaku kha 2 vīni nevu
rēni vighnamu sēsirēni ga
ṁgga kaṟta vēyi gavilala va
dhiṁccinavāru vāranāsi
vraccinavāru peddakoḍku
kapālamunaṁ guḍcinavā
ru svaradattaṁ paradataṁ
gvā yō harēti vasu
ṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭi rvvaruṣasa
hasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāya
tē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 10.159 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
